programme.desc: A failed Brooklyn writer, Nathan Fisher, visits his ailing parents in Florida. His mother has Alzheimer's and his father has recently had a stroke and his girlfriend has recently broken up with him.

programme.title: Bernie
programme.desc: In small-town Texas, the local mortician strikes up a friendship with a wealthy widow, though when he kills her, he goes to great lengths to create the illusion that she's alive.

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: The story centers on four not-so-young orphans: one reared by a curator at the Louvre (where an albino assassin lurks) another, a refugee from Mexican “libre” wrestling the third a recent victim of snakes on her plane and the fourth a “normal” resident of a mutant “X”-community. The hapless quartet visits a chocolate factory, where they stumble into an enchanted wardrobe that transports them to the land of Gnarnia (with a silent “G”). There they meet a flamboyant pirate captain and earnest students of wizardry - and join forces with, among others, a wise-but-horny lion to defeat the evil White Bitch of Gnarnia.

programme.title: Wild Cherry
programme.desc: A virginal high school senior decides to get revenge on her jock boyfriend when she discovers he's only dating her in hopes that she'll end up in his team's "bang book."

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history. Based on the novel by the author of War Horse, Waiting for Anya follows the story of Jo Lalande, a thirteen-year-old shepherd living in the mountain village of Lescun. Though Europe may be ravaged by the horrors of World War II, Jo's world in the French Pyrenees has remained remarkably untouched. That is, until a ferocious encounter with a bear introduces Jo to the mysterious Benjamin, a Jewish refugee who is desperately awaiting the arrival of his missing daughter, Anya, before making his escape across the border. Making friends with Benjamin and his mother-in-law Horcada, an isolated widow who lives in the nearby mountains, Jo becomes aware of a very dangerous secret - the family are involved in smuggling Jewish children over the mountains to the safety of Spain. In a heroic act of defiance, Jo promises to assist Benjamin in his endeavours...but soon becomes embroiled in a perilous conspiracy when German troops make their descent upon the village. Filmed in the village of Lescun and the surrounding Aspe Valley, France in which the true to life story also originated, the film boasts an all-stellar cast including Noah Schnapp (Stranger Things), Academy Award Winner Anjelica Huston (Ever After, The Addams Family), Jean Reno (Leon, The Big Blue, Ronin), Frederick Schmidt (Mission: Impossible - Fallout), Thomas Kretschmann (The Pianist, Central Intelligence) and Nicholas Rowe (Riviera, Lock Stock and Two Smoking Barrels).

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Henry V
programme.desc: King Henry V of England is insulted by the King of France. As a result, he leads his army into battle against France. Along the way, the young king must struggle with the sinking morale of his troops and his own inner doubts. The war culminates at the bloody Battle of Agincourt.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Checkmate
programme.desc: Six people are thrown together during an elaborate bank heist where any move can alter the outcome. Is it coincidence, or are they merely pawns in a much bigger game?

programme.title: Raptor Ranch
programme.desc: Fossil Ridge, once believed to be a cattle ranch is discovered to be a breeding ground for vicious prehistoric velociraptors. When the bloodthirsty dinosaurs escape, the townspeople must fight to survive the deadly raptors.

programme.title: Fire
programme.desc: Sita (Nandita Das) and Radha (Shabana Azmi) are two Indian women stuck in loveless marriages. While Sita is trapped in an arranged relationship with her cruel and unfaithful husband, Jatin (Jaaved Jaafei), Radha is married to his brother, Ashok (Kulbhushan Kharbanda), a religious zealot who believes in suppressing desire. As the two women recognize their similar situations, they grow closer, and t

programme.title: China Salesman
programme.desc: A Chinese IT company representative attempts to spoil a conspiracy to start a civil war in an African country orchestrated by an European businessman who is aided by a tough African warrior.

programme.title: The Dark Horse
programme.desc: The Dark Horse is an inspiring true story based on the life of a charismatic, brilliant but little-known New Zealand Hero and Chess champion - Genesis Potini. The Dark Horse is a provocative, emotionally-charged drama about a man who searches for the courage to lead, despite his own adversities - finding purpose and hope in passing on his gift to the children in his community.

programme.title: Heaven Is Waiting
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: A Gift Horse
programme.desc: A grieving, young girl works on the local ranch owned by a business tycoon, when a new horse arrives and she takes the opportunity to regain her faith by training it to win.

programme.title: Lost in Love
programme.desc: Two tourists in Turkey get left behind by their tour bus after visiting an archaeological site. Without their belongings, they must make their way back to Istanbul, improvising along the way with meager means.

programme.title: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: High-school Ag Science teacher Jodi Stafford meets commercial real-estate marketing specialist Mike Jared during her struggle to save her family's ailing dairy farm.

programme.title: Town Tamer
programme.desc: A gunfighter is hired to clean up a wild frontier town, but there are forces afoot who want to keep the town as wide-open as it is.

programme.title: My Name Is Shanghai Joe
programme.desc: A Chinese immigrant, recently arrived in America, fights to free Mexican slaves from their cruel master.

programme.title: Savage Pampas
programme.desc: In the late 1800's, an army captain tries to tame the open plains of Argentina which are dominated by Indians and bandits. To help do this, the captain brings in a party of women to keep his soldiers happy.

programme.title: White Feather
programme.desc: In 1877 Wyoming, during the peace negotiations between the Cheyenne and the USA, an Indian girl falls in-love with a land surveyor, causing the ire of her Cheyenne fiance.

programme.title: 4 Wedding Planners
programme.desc: When Lily goes home to Hawaii, she wants to help save her family's wedding planning business, even when her ex-boyfriend shows up as a new client.

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread
programme.desc: A story of a rich Edwardian widow who marries a handsome Tuscan dentist but dies in childbirth. Her English family travel to Italy in order to bring the child back home to England, but are unprepared for what unfolds...

programme.title: Meet My Valentine
programme.desc: Diagnosed with terminal cancer, Tom reconnects with his wife Valentine to create an online dating profile to secretly find her a replacement husband.

programme.title: Bride To Be
programme.desc: What if pain was merely a set up for the ultimate surprise party? Genie Burns, owner of Surprise Enterprise, masterminds surprise parties in nobody would-suspect-it locations. Here she takes crazy risks but in her love life, she plays it safe.

programme.title: Rise of the Fellowship
programme.desc: What if Lord of the Rings wasn't just a story? School outcasts Randall and his friends spend most of their time playing online games. After Randall is set up for a crime he didn't commit, things get really bad. When a Lord of the Rings gaming competition is announced they decide that they must compete to get their own back. Little do they know that the journey they face is fraught with peril!

programme.title: Navy Seals Vs. Zombies
programme.desc: A team of highly skilled Navy Seals find themselves embarking on the battle of their lives when they come face-to-face with the undead. After a deadly outbreak occurs in New Orleans, the Seals must fight for their lives, and the city, against an army of zombies. A.K.A. Navy Seals: Battle for New Orleans

programme.title: Prospect
programme.desc: A teenage girl and her father travel to a remote alien moon, aiming to strike it rich. They've secured a contract to harvest a large deposit of the elusive gems hidden in the depths of the moon's toxic forest. But there are others roving the wilderness and the job quickly devolves into a fight to survive.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A young officer in Napoleon's army pursues a mysterious woman to the castle of an elderly Baron.

programme.title: The Terror Of Tiny Town
programme.desc: An evil gunslinging midget comes to terrorize the good little people of Tiny Town. The townspeople organize to defeat him, and zany antics ensue.

programme.title: The Unvanquished
programme.desc: A boy leaves home to study in Calcutta, while his mother must face a life alone.

programme.title: The War Is Over
programme.desc: Following the bombardment of Kosovo in 1999, the Rahmanis and their three children emigrate to Switzerland. After years of living in their new homeland, the family faces the prospects of deportation.

programme.title: The Wine Of Summer
programme.desc: In the vein of “Under the Tuscan Sun”, James (Ethan Peck) quits his jobs and finally follows his dream. A great play inspires him to go on a journey of self-discovery, which leads him to Spain. There, James meets beautiful Veronica (Elsa Pataky) as well as the playwright who changed his life. Quickly, James gets tangled in a web of desire, love and broken trust.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: House of D
programme.desc: By working through his past problems, Tom Warshaw, an American artist living in Paris, begins to discover his true self and returns home to reconcile with his family and friends. Starring: David Duchovny, Téa Leoni, Robin Williams

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: Rise Of The Krays
programme.desc: The early years of the two of the most notorious British criminals are portrayed in visceral brutality. London, 1961: Ronnie and Reggie Kray begin a reign of terror that would define London's East End for years to come.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: Barbara Thorson (Madison Wolfe) is a teenage girl who escapes the realities of school and a troubled family life by retreating into her magical world of fighting evil giants. With the help of her new friend Sophia (Sydney Wade) and her school counsellor (Zoe Saldana), Barbara learns to face her fears and battle the giants that threaten her world.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Born from the sacrifices of man, the legendary Tree of Life promises eternity to those who drink its sap. It is the quest for this fabled tree… or more importantly, its gift, which has consumed Tom (Hugh Jackman) over the course of 1000 years. Told in a non-linear style, THE FOUNTAIN follows Tom's soul through three separate incarnations, each of whom is desperate to save the life of his soul mate Izzi (Rachel Weisz) by harnessing the power of The Tree.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Night Raiders
programme.desc: Night Raiders is a relentless and thought-provoking, dystopian thriller from executive producer Taika Waititi (Thor: Ragnarok, JoJo Rabbit), which stars Alex Tarrant (The Lord of the Rings TV Series) and Amanda Plummer (Pulp Fiction, The Hunger Games: Catching Fire). In 2043, in post-war North America, a desperate woman joins an underground band of vigilantes to infiltrate a military-occupied institution to rescue her daughter who has become property of the state.

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: Lauren, an exobiologist, tracked by Homeland security, is called in to find answers for this unearthly event. She reluctantly gets involved in the effort to solve the ensuing crisis. Meanwhile, a gigantic tree, an other-worldly object has grown at the site of the meteorite impact. It becomes apparent, once was speculated to be a meteorite is in fact an experimental seed sent to Earth in their search for a new home. The seed is sent from a dying world, a desperate world in order to grow their trees to create a habitable environment for themselves on Earth and then colonize.

programme.title: Sweetheart Con
programme.desc: Heartbroken over her parents' breakup and recovering from a car accident, Jane becomes increasingly suspicious of her mother's charming new boyfriend.

programme.title: Happily Never After
programme.desc: True crime writer, Kate, believes her children book writing days with her ex-boyfriend, Josh, are long over until her publisher requests a sequel. When problems begin to rise during the creative process, Kate and Josh decide to relive their past forcing them to fall in love all over again.

programme.title: Love on the Vines
programme.desc: When Diana inherits half her uncle's vineyard, she is surprised to find a rule requiring her to work the land with new co-owner Seth or risk losing the land.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: 10 Years
programme.desc: 10 Years follows a group of friends on the night of their high school reunion who, a decade after leaving school, still haven't quite grown up. Among the friends is Jake (Channing Tatum) who is deeply in love with his girlfriend and ready to propose until he runs into his high school flame (Rosario Dawson) for the first time in years. As the night goes on friendships are reignited, rivalries reemerge and for some, love is found in unexpected places.

programme.title: 5 Weddings
programme.desc: A journalist writing a story on Punjabi weddings falls in love with her liaison officer who is trying to keep her story censored amidst a colorful mosaic of transgender dancers and cultural clashes.

programme.title: Two Lovers
programme.desc: Leonard is an attractive but troubled young man living with his parents in suburban Brooklyn when two women enter his life. The lovely but ordinary daughter of his father's new business partner and his beautiful but volatile neighbour trapped in a destructive affair, whose passion helps to reignite his lust for life.

programme.title: Pretenders
programme.desc: Life imitates deadly art as French New Wave obsessed film student Terry (Jack Kilmer, The Nice Guys) and his best friend, the smooth talking Phil (Shameik Moore, Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse) are both seduced by mysterious actress Catherine (Jane Levy, Evil Dead ). The longer they know each other, the more they realise they don't truly know the real Catherine. After years of sex, betrayal, and collateral damage, the three careen into a lifestyle that leaves one of them fighting for their life.

programme.title: The Journey Home
programme.desc: In Northern Canada, a young boy defies nature to reunite an abandoned polar bear cub with its mother.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan discovers the people who raised him are not his parents, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: The harrowing tale of American heroes shipwrecked in shark-infested waters in the waning days of WWII.

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie
programme.desc: Conspirators plot to assassinate Adolf Hitler in July 1944.

programme.title: Rise of the Viking
programme.desc: From the director of epic fantasy, Black Sails and starring Breaking Bad's Jonathan Banks comes this historical actioner perfect for all Game of Thrones fans. 754 AD- during a time of epic battles and bloodshed, the legend of the pagan warrior king Redbad is born, but so is a new weapon against his people: Christianity. Redbad must unite a Viking army to defeat the seemingly invincible Franks.

programme.title: First Kill
programme.desc: No time off when it comes to crime! Starring Bruce Willis (Looper) and Gethin Anthony (Game of Thrones) this nail-biting, explosive thriller sees a holiday gone horribly wrong! In an attempt to reconnect with his son, Will (Haydn Christensen Jumper) takes his family to the cabin where he grew up. However, their trip takes a deadly turn when they witness the murder of a crooked police officer.

programme.title: Non-Transferable
programme.desc: Pack your bags for a whirlwind adventure across three continents as two strangers find out if love really is transferable! On the eve of a romantic trip-of-a-lifetime, love-struck Amy is dumped by her boyfriend. And reservations are not transferable! Determined not to miss out, Amy trawls the internet for a guy with the same name. This charming, laugh-out-loud take on modern love is a must watch.

programme.title: Killer In My Home
programme.desc: A woman's world falls apart when her husband dies of a heart attack

programme.title: Twisted Tenant
programme.desc: A woman finds a handsome stranger in her childhood bedroom but discovers that he is hiding a secret past. Starring Lauren Swickard (2018)

programme.title: The Sinister Surrogate
programme.desc: A couple discover that the surrogate mother of their child will stop at nothing to keep the baby. Starring Maeve Quinlan (2018)

programme.title: Escape Plan 2
programme.desc: Ray Breslin must return to the prison he escaped from after a member of his security team goes missing. Starring Sylvester Stallone and Dave Bautista (2018)

programme.title: Settlers
programme.desc: The first humans on Mars do what they must to survive the cosmic elements and each other. Starring Jonny Lee Miller (2021)

programme.title: Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Laura and Spencer are strangers who are forced to share a beachside holiday home after a mix-up with their reservations. Will they ultimately prove that opposites really do attract? (2017)

programme.title: Love Afloat
programme.desc: Lorelei travels to the Caribbean after inheriting a sailboat from her late uncle.

programme.title: The Seven Year Hitch
programme.desc: Jennifer invites her childhood best friend Kevin to live with her. Seven years later, the friends are still living together, but Jennifer is now engaged. Can Kevin prove he is her true love? (2012)

programme.title: Fashionably In Love
programme.desc: New York playboy Oliver needs to clear up his image by dating Avery a respectable socialite. Will this unluckily pairing turn into anything more? (2022)

programme.title: Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Laura and Spencer are strangers who are forced to share a beachside holiday home after a mix-up with their reservations. Will they ultimately prove that opposites really do attract? (2017)

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: The Beaver
programme.desc: Two-time Academy Award winner Jodie Foster directs and co-stars with two-time Academy Award winner Mel Gibson in The Beaver - an emotional story about a man on a journey to re-discover his family and re-start his life. Plagued by his own demons, Walter Black was once a successful toy executive and family man who now suffers from depression. No matter what he tries, Walter can't seem to get himself back on track... until a beaver hand puppet enters his life.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: What would you do if you thought you only had one week left to live? Would you radically change what was left of your life? Re-evaluate your values and priorities? Those are the last questions in the world that Lanie Kerrigan (Angelina Jolie) thought she'd ever have to face. A feature reporter at a Seattle television station, Lanie thinks her life is perfect. Perfect job. Perfect apartment. Perfect wardrobe. Perfect boyfriend.

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: John lives with his partner, Eric, and their daughter, Mónica in California, far from the traditional rural life he left behind years ago. John's father, Willis, a headstrong man from a bygone era, lives alone on the isolated farm where John grew up. Willis is in the early stages of dementia, so John brings him to stay with him. During his stay at John's California home, tension builds between Willis and the rest of the family.We embark on a journey from darkness to light, from rage and resentment to acceptance and hard-won grace.

programme.title: The Shadow Riders
programme.desc: In this made-for-TV movie, two brothers who battled on opposing sides of the Civil War return home at the end of the war to discover that their family has been kidnapped by Confederate forces.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four drifters arrive in a small frontier town and become unlikely heroes in a battle against a powerful family and a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: Gumshoe
programme.desc: Story about a bingo-caller who, bored with his mundane existence, takes out a newspaper ad offering his services as a private detective.

programme.title: 30 Minutes or Less
programme.desc: The tale of three slacker friends and the adventures that ensure after one of them inadvertently robs a bank armed only with a large salami.

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: The parents of an abducted daughter go to unprecedented lengths to get her back unharmed.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: Exotic Tanya Roberts stars as Sheena, a comic book legend that comes to life. As a child, she was lost in the African jungle and adopted by the Zambouli tribe. She rules over the untamed wilds of Africa, until outsiders challenge her domain in this fun-filled action-adventure.

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times
programme.desc: In Neil Simon's SEEMS LIKE OLD TIMES, Chevy Chase is forced to abet some bank robbers, and soon the cops are after him. His ex-wife, Goldie Hawn, is a liberal lawyer married to the local district attorney. When Chase arrives at their home seeking shelter, she takes him in and their passions are rekindled.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer's search for Mr. Perfect has left her hopelessly single. She's in for a rude awakening when her bosses team her with Mike Chadway, a hardcore TV personality who promises to spill the ugly truth on what makes men and women tick.

programme.title: The Big Picture
programme.desc: Hollywood is hilariously lampooned in this behind-the-scenes look at making it, no matter what. Kevin Bacon stars.

programme.title: Away From Her
programme.desc: After 45 years of marriage, Fiona and Grant are struck with a devastating blow, the looming clouds of Alzheimer's disease. In a heart-breaking decision, Fiona is moved into a residential facility. But there's one more shock on the horizon as Fiona starts to transfer her affections to another man at the nursing home. A double-Oscar-nominated, beautifully subtle exploration of a devastating disease.

programme.title: A Tale of Love and Darkness
programme.desc: Based on Amos Oz's international best-seller, A TALE OF LOVE AND DARKNESS is the story of Oz's youth at the end of the British Mandate for Palestine and the early years of the State of Israel.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: Chronicles the young David Bowie's first visit to the US in 1971 - a trip that inspired the invention of his iconic alter ego, Ziggy Stardust.

programme.title: The Pursuit Of Happiness
programme.desc: An alienated social drop-out accidentally runs over a woman in a rain storm. Though he can prove it was an accident, he refuses to cooperate with "the establishment," and is sentenced to a year in prison. With only a week left to his sentence, he gets involved in a knifing and manages to escape. He looks up his old girlfriend and the two fly off to Canada.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: THE DARKEST HOUR is the story of five young people who find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack. The 3D thriller highlights the classic beauty of Moscow alongside mind-blowing special effects from the minds of visionary filmmaker Timur Bekmambetov (Wanted, Night Watch) and director Chris Gorak.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: I Am Wrath
programme.desc: Golden Globe winner John Travolta returns to the action genre with a hard as nails performance as a man with nothing left to lose, seeking bloody vengeance! Unemployed engineer Stanley Hill witnesses the brutal murder of his wife Vivian who was attacked by thugs in a parking garage. When Detective Gibson and other corrupt police officers are unable and unwilling to bring the killers to justice, Stanley turns to his old friend Dennis and decides to take matters into his own hands. It is only then that Stanley and Dennis are found to have a mysterious past that, until now, they kept very well hidden.

programme.title: Acceleration
programme.desc: Vladik Zorich (Dolph Lundgren), a crime lord whose tentacles permeate the underbelly of a seedy Los Angeles as he deals in guns, gambling, drugs, and skin trafficking, finds himself double-crossed by his most trusted operative Rhona Zyocki (Natalie Burn). Vladik's propensity for power, control, and violence drives him to kidnap Rhona's young son. To ensure her son's release, Rhona is forced to participate in a planned elimination of Vladik's enemies and allies. As her son's life hangs in the balance, Rhona struggles to find and eliminate Vladik's most violent and twisted enemies and retrieve valuable goods and information, all in one fateful night.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Force Of Attraction
programme.desc: Shakti promises Manorama that she will expose Ranjan. Padma suggests to Bhagwati and Raghunath that they should marry Shiv and Shakti as soon as possible.

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: Dua is happily married to her husband until he makes a request to her. Her seemingly perfect life goes for a toss when he seeks her permission to marry another woman.

programme.title: Love Through New Eyes
programme.desc: An understanding woman helps her daughter-in-law, who is seemingly overweight, in her endeavours to lose weight by providing the right kind of encouragement.

programme.desc: Choti Guddan, who wants to revive her father, AJ's, restaurant, crosses path with Pushpa Birla who aims to destroy the former by any means, including using her own son Agastya for her evil purposes.

programme.desc: Yash, a rich businessman, seeks true love. When he falls in love with Neha, a beautiful woman, he faces trouble winning her over.

programme.title: Meet In Love

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: To us the beach is one giant playground, but for wildlife it's a place to live, to find food and to raise their young. Amongst the fish and chips, sandcastles and donkey rides it's easy to forget that beaches are vital habitats, home to a myriad of animals.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Elephant human conflict has been going on in India for decades. Only now it has increased because of the shrinking forests and the expanding human habitation. North Bengal with it's fragmented habitat of tea gardens, human habitation and paddy fields is a hot bed of conflict

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: The Royal Bengal Tiger is in it's most primeval form here in the Sunderbans. `The tangled mangroves along the tributaries of the river Ganga are one of the most fearsome forests of the World. The tigers could kill humans and eat them.

programme.title: From Cubs To Kings
programme.desc: From a miserable existence as a tourist sideshow in Spain to the wild plains of Africa, 'From Cubs to Kings' follows two cubs on their journey to a better future.

programme.title: Slow Down and Enjoy Life
programme.desc: The natural world often moves so fast that we don't even see it, but slow it down the action and a whole new world is revealed.

programme.title: Bucketlist Europe
programme.desc: Europe is a densely packed continent, with some 700 million residents living across 50 countries. It's famed for its ancient cities and civilisations, but is sometimes overlooked when it comes to the natural world. But there's no doubt that the continent is a treasure trove of natural beauty, a mosaic of landscapes each filled with their own unique animal communities. If you were planning a bucket list trip of the natural wonders of Europe, you'd only have to ask yourself one question: where would you start?

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: We love our coasts, and so do animals! The corridor of water where the open ocean transitions into coastal habitat is known as the surf zone. The churning forces of the waves clashing with the land make these some of the most food-rich waters on Earth.

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: To us the beach is one giant playground, but for wildlife it's a place to live, to find food and to raise their young. Amongst the fish and chips, sandcastles and donkey rides it's easy to forget that beaches are vital habitats, home to a myriad of animals.

programme.title: Wild Prairie Man
programme.desc: Located in the Northern Great Plains of Canada, Grasslands National Park has been a 20 year odyssey for wildlife photographer James R. Page. For James, critters are more interesting than people and he shares some of his iconic images and experiences from this endangered ecosystem. We showcase the parks wilderness that is dominated by prairie light and dark sky, the wildlife, prairie dogs, mesmerizing landscapes, and bisons. We immerse ourselves in the wild habitat of Grasslands National Park for over a year capturing some never before scenes in the Wild Prairie. James R. Page's connection to the land and the wildlife provides an unforgettable journey into the heart of this endangered ecosystem, while Park experts help us understand its complexity.

programme.title: Hunters of the Skies
programme.desc: Birds of prey are symbols of power, speed and splendour. In fact, there are very few species in the animal kingdom that can be described in as many superlatives. Their amazing use of different senses, their incredible feats of flight as well as their multitude of different hunting strategies are simply astounding. Hawks, buzzards and eagles have conquered every habitat on earth - from the dry arid south, to the cool and moist river valleys, to the coasts of Norway, all the way up to the sparse high mountains. Some of them, like the incredibly versatile hawk, can even hunt in the forest. Their literal eagle eye vision is unrivaled in the animal kingdom. All birds of prey sustain themselves through hunting, and they do so elegantly and, it seems, with effortless beauty and efficiency. This is one of many reasons why they are much admired, even romanticised, by many cultures. Buckle up and join us on this aerial adventure with spectacular insights into this amazing world of birds of prey.

programme.title: The Incredible Five
programme.desc: Cheetahs are the high-speed hunters of the Savannah. Few attempt to take on larger prey than gazelles or smallish antelopes. But on occasion, the predatory cats reveal their surprisingly different side. In the Northern Serengeti, a group of male cheetahs emerges and turns all we know about them upside down. Males are usually loners or live in small groups, but here we have five tomcats hunting together as one. It is actually, the largest alliance of the animals ever seen! This film has many stories to tell about the sleek hunters.

programme.title: Search for the Ghost Bears
programme.desc: Our film journey begins in Alaska's west. We are hoping to find glacier bears in the glacial regions of the Katmai National Park on the Douglas River. At the end of July, brown bears have now arrived to fish for salmon. In the surrounding forests, grizzlies look for berries and fresh, green twigs. The Katmai is Alaska's most volcanic area, and with 15 active volcanoes it is a veritable powder keg, surrounded by glaciers. In the Hook glacier region moose and lynx accompany us. Bald eagles have arrived at the glacial boundary and begin to tear apart their freshly caught prey. At last, we catch sight of a glacier bear. Hungry, he has left the ice region and has been forced down here in search of food, which he satisfies extensively with fresh shoots and berries. Continuing our film trip, we head for Prince Royal Island in British Columbia. En route, we meet with black bears on their way with their young to fish for salmon. The mother bears have to remain alert to protect their young, as we have spotted some New World porcupines too. Then, out of the blue, directly in front of us: the Kermode, or spirit bear. He shows no signs of timidity and is only interested in one thing: salmon. Then, a further Kermode appears, enjoying his cranberry dessert, allowing us to approach him, almost too close for comfort. But a black bear arrives on the scene and claims the cranberry bush for itself. After a brief confrontation, the Kermode opts to leave, preferring to focus on salmon fishing. Fascinating footage of this rare species of animal.

programme.title: Wild Moments: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Whenever humans enter the wilderness – no matter if they are scientists, cameramen or just outdoor fans – they will face unforgettable encounters: the discovery of new species in the jungles of New Guinea, the scary moments when a group of white sharks surround a diving team off the coast of South Africa and the dedicated work of wildlife warriors who try to save jaguars and gorillas to name a few. Wildlife film makers sometimes risk life and limb too. In Siberia Uwe Anders is taken by surprise by an uninvited guest – a polar bear. Wildlife film makers experience also many emotionally touching moments: Oliver Goetzl and Ivo Nörenberg are witnessing a wolf approaching a lone newborn bison. But just in time its mother arrives. The ten part series shows the funniest but also the most dangerous and the most emotional moments in the wild.

programme.title: Wild Moments: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Whenever humans enter the wilderness – no matter if they are scientists, cameramen or just outdoor fans – they will face unforgettable encounters: the discovery of new species in the jungles of New Guinea, the scary moments when a group of white sharks surround a diving team off the coast of South Africa and the dedicated work of wildlife warriors who try to save jaguars and gorillas to name a few. Wildlife film makers sometimes risk life and limb too. In Siberia Uwe Anders is taken by surprise by an uninvited guest – a polar bear. Wildlife film makers experience also many emotionally touching moments: Oliver Goetzl and Ivo Nörenberg are witnessing a wolf approaching a lone newborn bison. But just in time its mother arrives. The ten part series shows the funniest but also the most dangerous and the most emotional moments in the wild.

programme.title: Wild Moments: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Nature has many weird creatures to offer and often these animals fascinate us the most. There are ants in Australia's outback that use specialised workers as living honey pots. In Africa in the endless Bangweulu wetlands of Zambia the shoebill is on the hunt for fish, a bird that definitely lives up to its name. Finally in the Brazilian rainforests lurk gruesome river monsters in the Amazon abyss that send shivers down the spine of even the most experienced divers. But there are also intense human-animal-relationships like the close bond between a German diver and a dolphin female who explore the Atlantic off the coast of Ireland, or the "easy rider" in California who has taken care of an African elephant bull for more than 25 years. Weird! is a breath-taking journey to visit animals around the globe who are somehow different.
